seoTitle: How to Connect Typeform and HubSpot for Lead Generation
metaDescription: Learn how to sync Typeform responses into HubSpot to automatically create and update contacts and trigger follow-up workflows.
intro: Manually entering leads into a CRM slows down follow-up and risks lost opportunities. This guide covers how to connect Typeform with HubSpot so form submissions automatically create or update contacts, keeping your lead generation process running without manual data entry.

steps.heading: Open Typeform Integrations
steps.body: Go to the integrations section of your Typeform account to find the HubSpot connection option.

steps.heading: Connect your HubSpot account
steps.body: Authenticate your HubSpot account within Typeform to enable data to flow between the two platforms.

steps.heading: Map fields and configure sync
steps.body: Match Typeform questions to the corresponding HubSpot contact properties so submissions populate the right fields.

steps.heading: Test the lead generation workflow
steps.body: Submit a test response and confirm the contact is created or updated correctly in HubSpot before going live.

faq.question: Does this create new contacts automatically in HubSpot?
faq.answer: Yes, once configured, new Typeform submissions automatically create or update contacts in your HubSpot CRM.

faq.question: Can this trigger follow-up workflows in HubSpot?
faq.answer: Yes, new or updated contacts from Typeform can trigger existing HubSpot workflows, such as follow-up emails or task assignments.

faq.question: What happens if a submitted email already exists in HubSpot?
faq.answer: Depending on your configuration, the integration can update the existing contact's record rather than creating a duplicate.

faq.question: Is this integration useful for sales teams?
faq.answer: Yes, it helps ensure every new lead is captured in the CRM immediately, improving lead qualification and sales productivity.
